overall.description: A first-person view from inside a modern apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, watching various television programs including weapon advertisements, food commercials, and a talk show. The scene transitions from bright afternoon daylight to dusk blue-hour lighting outside the large windows while the camera remains stationary focused on the TV screen.

agents.ego_description: sitting and watching weapon advertisements and horror imagery on the television

entered.detail: large flatscreen television displaying weapon advertisements and animated content
dark wooden desk with items including remote control and papers
floor-to-ceiling windows showing bright afternoon cityscape and balcony
television remote placed on the left side of the desk
shallow decorative bowl on the right side of the desk

segments.scene_description: The camera sits stationary in a modern apartment living room, focused on a wall-mounted television displaying various advertisements including a Techtronika weapon and surreal horror imagery. Bright afternoon sunlight streams through the large windows behind the TV, illuminating the desk and remote control in the foreground.

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from bright afternoon to dusk blue-hour, darkening the room significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing to watch television as the room darkens to evening

segments.scene_description: The apartment room darkens to dusk as the television displays the All Foods commercial featuring a creepy mascot and various synthetic food products. The city view outside transitions to deep blue evening tones while the TV screen becomes the primary light source in the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment living room watching talk show

events.description: television content switches from commercial advertisement to the talk show 'Night After Night with Ziggy Q'

agents.ego_description: watching the talk show host Ziggy Q interview a guest on the television program

segments.scene_description: The television now displays the talk show 'Night After Night with Ziggy Q' featuring the host in a gold jacket performing and interviewing a guest against a neon-lit set. The apartment remains in dusk lighting with the city visible through the windows behind the TV.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective within a modern apartment as the environment shifts from bright afternoon daylight to the deep blue tones of dusk. It begins with the camera focused on a wall-mounted television displaying weapon advertisements and surreal imagery, while strong sunlight illuminates a desk and remote control in the foreground. As the light outside the large windows fades into evening, the room darkens and the television becomes the primary light source, transitioning to a synthetic food commercial featuring a creepy mascot. The scene then shifts to a neon-lit talk show featuring a host in a gold jacket, while the city view behind the screen settles into a permanent dusk glow.
